name: Joe Gilberto
bios: I’m a versatile software engineer with a passion for creative problem-solving and collaboration. My journey into software development has been fueled by a passion for building efficient solutions and hands-on contribution to thoughtful user experiences.

Currently, I work as a software developer at Karen Clark & Co., specializing in both frontend and backend development. My work includes enhancing intuitive React apps, maintaining a Windows Forms UI, and developing new functionality in ASP.NET APIs. I also upkeep a PHP-based CMS for the company website and rewrote a multi-source address standardization and geocoding service.
